titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Latif Al-Taflisi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Latif Al-Taflisi

segments: ه عن عبد اللّه بن لطيف التفليسيّ فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عبد اللّه بن لطيف التفليسيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عبد اللّه بن لطيف التفليسيّ فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عبد اللّه بن لطيف التفليسيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdullah ibn Latif Al-Taflisi has been transmitted by me from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Abdullah ibn Latif Al-Taflisi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdullah ibn Latif Al-Taflisi has been transmitted by me from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Abdullah ibn Latif Al-Taflisi.
